raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid tas tahtu no mum̄s
irr/ ka meh̄ buhtun tam KUN-
GAM prettiturrejchees/ jeb fcho-
deën no ta KUNGA atgreest-
tchees/ uszeldami weenu Altari
par Dedsameem-Uppureetn/ par
Ehdamo-Uppureemi / un par zic-
teem Uppureem pahtt pahr ta
KUNGA muhta Deewa Altari/
kas preekſch winna Dsihwokli irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad Pineas tas Preeste-
ris/ un tah̄ Draudses Wirfneeki/
un tee Augstajee pahr teem Isra-
etä tuh̄ſtoſcheem/ kas pee ta bija/
toh̄s Wahrdus dsirdeja/ ko Ruh-
beka Behrni/ un Gada Behrni/
un Manaffus Behrni runnaja/
tad patikke tas winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Pineas/ Geleasara ta
Preestera Dehis fazzija ue Ruh-
beka Behrneem/ un us Gada
Behrneem / un us Manaffus
Behrneem: Schodeen atsihstam
meh̄/ ka tas KUNGS muhfu
Widdū irr/ ka juhs ar fcho No-
feegunu ne effat prett to KUN-
GII noſeeguschees/ nu effat juhs
toh̄s Israëta Behrnusisqłahbu-
schi no ta KUNGA Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atgreesahs Pineas/
Geleasara ta Preestera Dehis/ un
tee Wirfneeki no Ruhbeka Behr-
neem/ un no Gada Behrneem/
no Gileadas Semnes/ us Kana-
ana Semni pee teem Israëta
Behrneem/un atfazzija winneem
fcho Wahrdü.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad patikke tas Wahrd̄
teem Israëta Behrneem/ un J-
sraëta Behrni teize Deewu/ un
ne dohmaja wahrs prett winneem
zeltees ar Kh̄xa-Spehku/neds to
Semmi maitaht / eekſch ka Ruh-
bena Behrni un Gada Behrni
dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ruhbena Behrni un
Gada Behrni noſauze to Altari/
laid tas par Leezineeku irr starp
mum̄s/ ka tas KUNGS par
Deewu irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N pehz ilgu Latku / kad
Utas KUNGS Israëtam
Duffeschann bij dewis/
no wiﬀeem winno Eenaidnee
keem wiſsapkahrt / un Josuitē
bijā wezz tappis/ un labbi pee
dsihwojs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad safanze Josuiis wiﬀu
Israëta Wezzajus/ un wiﬀu
Augstakus/ un winno Sohgus
un winno Wirfneekus/ un fazz
ja us teem : Es efim wezz tap-
pis/ un labbi preedsihwojs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs effat wiſku redsejsch
ko tas KUNGS juhsu Deew-
dartijā irr wiſſahin fschah-
Tantahm juhsu Preekscha/ io ta
KUNGS juhsu Deews irr ta-
kas preekſch juhs farrojs irr.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
